title_quote: Approach: fitness ranking, transcript/proteome panel, and cross-species annotation screen — five mechanism layers
issue: Bullet 2 names the things the panel investigates as 'ChvI phase structure, constitutive sphingolipid state, Lpt repurposing, and PG remodel (28 loci)'. The phrase 'Lpt repurposing' is asserted as a topic the deck delivers, but REPORT §Finding 4 protein table and §Interpretation §5 explicitly classify the Lpt arm as MIXED with transcript-protein discordance (LptD −0.47, LptE −0.78), and the deck's own Q&A slide 32 instructs the speaker: 'Do not say Lpt is maintained — say transcript is consistent with Lpt maintenance; protein requires replication.' The Approach slide commits to delivering 'repurposing' that the body of the deck then has to walk back.

report_evidence.quote: Lpt apparatus repurposing in the Δ*lpxc* state shows transcript-protein discordance *(MIXED)*

fix_hint: Rephrase bullet 2 ending to: '...constitutive sphingolipid state, candidate Lpt repurposing (transcript-up, protein discordant), and PG remodel (28 loci)' — the same parenthetical the deck uses on slide 17, applied here so the Approach slide does not over-promise.
